lex.bot.cloudwatchloggrouplogdestination: Specifies the Amazon CloudWatch Logs log group where text and metadata logs are delivered. The log group must exist before you enable logging.

lex.bot.cloudwatchloggrouplogdestination.Description: Specifies the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the log group where text and metadata logs are delivered.
Specifies the prefix of the log stream name within the log group that you specified.
